The club was coached by [[Tony Rea]], competing in [[Super League VII]] and finishing in 8th place. The club also got to the fifth round of the [[2002 Challenge Cup|Challenge Cup]]. ==Super League VII table== {{Super League VII ladder|showteam=LON}} ==2002 Challenge Cup== For the third consecutive year, the [[London Broncos|Broncos]] were knocked out of the cup at the fifth round stage.{{cite web|title=2002 Challenge
